hero.name: Alexander
hero.nameExplanation: Salty Caramel + Frappuccino = SaltyFrappuccino. My favorite coffee, hence the name, and I'm a coffee addict in general. ☕
hero.description: Building the future with code. Creating AI agents, fullstack applications, and everything in between.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who am I?
about.description: I'm Alexander, 21 years old, from Russia 🇷🇺. AI Agent Systems Specialist at Sber and a teacher at Quantorium. I create intelligent AI agents, build scalable web applications, and teach the next generation of developers.

philosophy.title: 🤖 AI & Coding
philosophy.text: Fighting progress is futile. The best approach is when AI is your programming partner, not the programmer itself. AI amplifies the developer but doesn't replace them.
